# ito.md

> An agent trust hub. People register, agents onboard, trust flows from humans.

## API

All endpoints support content negotiation:
- Accept: text/markdown → raw markdown
- Accept: text/html → rendered HTML
- Accept: application/json → JSON

## Endpoints

- GET /api/people — list all people
- GET /api/people/:id — person profile with tools, agents, follows
- GET /api/agents — list all agents
- GET /api/agents/:id — agent profile with owner info
- GET /api/discover — search by trust flags, tools, follows
  - ?flag=trust_code — people with trust_code flag
  - ?flag=personal_connection — people with personal_connection flag
  - ?tag=mcp-server — people who use tools tagged "mcp-server"
  - ?person=harperreed — specific person by GitHub username
  - ?followed-by=Joi — people followed by a specific person

## Trust Model

Two flags per person:
- trust_code — I trust tools/agents they build
- personal_connection — I know and trust this person

Trust is assigned by the hub administrator. Agents inherit trust from their owners.

## Onboarding

- GET /api/onboard/preflight?github=username — check if pre-registered
- GET /content/onboard.md — agent-driven onboarding guide

## Authentication

- GitHub OAuth: GET /api/auth/github
- Google OAuth: GET /api/auth/google
